attributes.additional_details: All concert floors are standing and it’s really unaccessible for people who need a seat or get anxious in large groups of people. People who stand are also more prone to passing out and getting hurt and dehydrating. People who stand also camp out which makes it unfair. Therefore if there are seats in every single pit of a concert there will be less passing out, no campers and no one getting hurt because no one will be able to push to get to the front because it won’t be their designated seat.
attributes.background: All concert floors are standing BUT, it’s not accessible for everyone. So I want chairs in every pit of a concert so everyone has a fair chance of being at the front and have a fair chance of interacting with their favourite artists.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do, and whether you're calling for all venues to be all-seated, or whether you would like there to be more seating on concert floors.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.
